summary: CRITICAL ISSUES: (1) Actions not pinned to commit SHAs—security violation (line 30: actions/checkout@v4 must be actions/checkout@<SHA>). (2) Missing required files: test/artifact-cleanup.bats, test/fixtures/*.txt, .actrc referenced but not provided. Workflow cannot execute without them. (3) run-tests.sh hardcodes expected values (e.g. line 191: 'Artifacts to delete: 3') with no fixture definitions—tests unverifiable. (4) Assertion duplication (lines 139-154, 191-216) could be parameterized. Script logic is sound but deliverable is incomplete and insecure.
